resume.headline: AI Backend Engineer | Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
experience_highlights: Built schema-first resume and job parsing workflows with Pydantic validation and JSON
Implemented hybrid semantic and lexical matching using sentence-transformer embeddings
Designed truth-guard checks to prevent unsupported resume rewrite claims.
Created evaluation reports for parser quality, semantic matching, and truth-guard
Maintained CI quality gates with pytest, mypy, ruff, and GitHub Actions.
Delivered FastAPI and PostgreSQL services for analytics dashboards and internal workflow

education.school: B.S. Computer Science, University of Technology, Vietnam.

job.title: LLM Platform Engineer — TalentGraph AI
responsibilities: Build FastAPI services for document ingestion, parsing, matching, and report generation.
Integrate OpenAI-compatible chat completion providers and local fallback clients.
Design pgvector-backed semantic search and hybrid lexical/semantic scoring pipelines.
Create evaluation datasets and automated metrics for extraction quality, semantic recall, and guardrail safety.
Maintain CI quality gates using pytest, mypy, ruff, and GitHub Actions.
